programme.title: Through Your Eyes
programme.desc: In the region of Guangxi in China Sophie meets some of the world's oldest farming people, Zhuangfolket. Among the bamboo forests and risterasser she learns an old fashioned way of life. Even the villagers get to experience something new.

programme.desc: In the region of Guangxi in China Sophie meets some of the world's oldest farming people, Zhuangfolket. Among the bamboo forests and risterasser she learns an old fashioned way of life. Even the villagers get to experience something new.

programme.desc: We head to Santa Monica, the hub of the latest health trends. Val discovers Erewhon, Los Angeles' largest organic supermarket.

programme.title: Fresh Yoga
programme.desc: The different outdoor episodes make us discover the magnificent panoramas between sky and sea, light and shade. In this episode, Katy shows you how to wake up your senses and embody nature.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Featuring tutorials, coaching, exercises and practical lifestyle tips.

programme.title: Through Your Eyes
programme.desc: In the region of Guangxi in China Sophie meets some of the world's oldest farming people, Zhuangfolket. Among the bamboo forests and risterasser she learns an old fashioned way of life. Even the villagers get to experience something new.

programme.title: Through Your Eyes
programme.desc: In the region of Guangxi in China Sophie meets some of the world's oldest farming people, Zhuangfolket. Among the bamboo forests and risterasser she learns an old fashioned way of life. Even the villagers get to experience something new.

programme.title: My Zen Trendy
programme.desc: Discover Chromo Yoga: combing Chromotherapy (light therapy and colour therapy) and yoga, chromo-yoga improves emotional and physical well-being.

programme.title: Parisian Style
programme.desc: Constance Gennari travels throughout the cities of France to meet families for whom the art of decoration is a real passion.

programme.title: Parisian Style
programme.desc: Constance Gennari travels throughout the cities of France to meet families for whom the art of decoration is a real passion.

programme.title: Food Nanny
programme.desc: The Food Nanny helps bring families back to the dinner table.

programme.title: Yogi Cameron: A Model Guru
programme.desc: Yogi Cameron uses ancient treatments to help clients heal.

programme.title: Destination Happiness
programme.desc: Follow a roadmap to joy and uncover insightful, uplifting and inspiring ideas for the mind, body and soul. Give your life an over-haul from the inside out.

programme.desc: In the region of Guangxi in China Sophie meets some of the world's oldest farming people, Zhuangfolket. Among the bamboo forests and risterasser she learns an old fashioned way of life. Even the villagers get to experience something new.
